description: The Republic of Ireland's Health Service Executive (HSE) has approved larotrectinib monotherapy for reimbursement for the treatment of adult patients with solid tumors that display a Neurotrophic Tyrosine Receptor Kinase (NTRK) gene fusion. This indication is for patients whose disease is locally advanced, metastatic, or where surgical resection is likely to result in severe morbidity, and who have no satisfactory treatment options.
